task_description: Build a world-class premium website for AVAIAA, a boutique coastal hospitality brand in Varkala, Kerala. The site must feature rich animations (Three.js ocean shader, GSAP ScrollTrigger cinematic effects, Lenis smooth scroll), premium typography, custom cursor, horizontal gallery, and a deeply layered visual design that feels cinematic rather than flat.

verification.summary: All 8 files created and present. All 6 JS files pass node --check syntax validation. CSS is 1646 lines (comprehensive premium stylesheet). JS total is 1182 lines with GLSL shaders, 13 GSAP ScrollTrigger animations, magnetic cursor, GSAP horizontal gallery, and Lenis smooth scroll. All verbatim content from specification is present in HTML. No build tooling or external dependencies needed at build time.
